title: Smelting Pickaxe
description: Smelting Pickaxe lets you skip the furnace and auto-smelt blocks as you mine!
body:
# ⛏️ Smelting Pickaxe

> **Project Status:** `RELEASE / PRODUCTION READY`
>  
> *Security Notice: This plugin has been thoroughly tested, optimized, and verified safe for use in live production environments. However, due to the nature of dynamic block scanning, absolute safety under extreme edge cases cannot be unconditionally guaranteed. And this project is still In Active Development.*

Say goodbye to furnace trips! The Smelting Pickaxe mod makes mining way more convenient by auto-smelting blocks as you break them. No more stopping to cook ores or cluttering your base with extra furnaces—just mine and collect the good stuff instantly. It’s simple, fast, and perfect for players who want smoother gameplay without the grind. Whether you’re exploring caves or clearing out builds, this pickaxe keeps your inventory full of ready-to-use materials so you can focus on the fun!

---

### 📋 Key Technical Specifications

> *   **Platform Support:** `Fabric` | `Forge` | `NeoForge`
> *   **Target Environment:** Minecraft `1.20.1 - 1.21.x` *(Compiled, tested, and optimized for 1.21.11)*
> *   **Runtime Requirement:** `Java 25/21/17` or higher

---

### ⚡ System Features

#### • Automated Resource Processing
> **Instant Material Conversion:**
> Bypasses traditional smelting steps by executing real-time block-to-item transactions:
> *   Eliminates the requirement for localized furnace setups during mining expeditions.
> *   Prevents structural inventory bloat by dropping raw ores directly as refined products.
> *   Optimizes gameplay loops for faster, grind-free resource accumulation.

#### • Architecture & Roadmap
> **Version Support & Updates:**
> Active expansion arrays are currently being developed across modern toolsets:
> *   Legacy environments sitting below version `1.20.1` are not planned for active development.
> *   Deployment should target the latest production builds for full stability hooks.

#### • Integrity Controls
> **Safety and Compatibility:**
> Engineered for seamless deployment without structural file corruption risks:
> *   Verified 100% stable for integration directly into existing, highly valued worlds.
> *   Zero known environment conflicts or mod incompatibilities identified during testing routines.

---

### 🕹️ Operational Workflow

#### 📦 Step 1: Initialization
> **Equip:**
> Acquire and hold the specialized Smelting Pickaxe variant within your primary equipment slot.

#### 🔋 Step 2: Extraction Phase
> **Mine:**
> Target any valid vanilla or modded ore block structure within standard block-breaking range.

#### 🪓 Step 3: Execution
> **Chop:**
> Destroy the target block to instantly trigger the automatic smelting script, routing processed items to your buffer.
